query: I need assistance with planning a week-long trip for three people, starting from Punta Gorda and traveling to three different cities in Michigan. The trip dates are from March 6th to March 12th, 2022, and our new budget is set at $4,400. For dining, we'd like to try local American and French cuisines.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Punta Gorda to Pellston, duration: 21 hours 40 mins, distance: 2,457 km, cost: 122
plan.attraction: Pellston Pioneer Park; Pellston Historical Society Museum; Philip J. Braun Nature Preserve;
plan.accommodation: Beautiful apartment ~25min from Times Square, Pellston

plan.attraction: Petoskey State Park; Headlands International Dark Sky Park; Wilderness State Park;
plan.accommodation: Beautiful apartment ~25min from Times Square, Pellston

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Pellston to Traverse City, duration: 1 hour 49 mins, distance: 137 km, cost: 6
plan.attraction: Clinch Park; Great Lakes Children's Museum; World's Largest Cherry Pie Pan;
plan.accommodation: Convenient Financial District Studio, Traverse City

plan.attraction: Pirate's Cove Adventure Park; Mission Point Lighthouse; Great Wolf Lodge Water Park | Traverse City;
plan.accommodation: Convenient Financial District Studio, Traverse City

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Traverse City to Alpena, duration: 2 hours 29 mins, distance: 204 km, cost: 10
plan.attraction: Great Lakes Maritime Heritage Center; Besser Museum for Northeast Michigan; Mich-e-ke-wis Park;
plan.accommodation: Loft in Times Square with Roof Balcony, Alpena

plan.attraction: Thunder Bay National Marine Sanctuary; Arzo Amusement Park; Alpena Wildlife Sanctuary;
plan.accommodation: Loft in Times Square with Roof Balcony, Alpena

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Alpena to Punta Gorda, duration: 21 hours 39 mins, distance: 2,401 km, cost: 120
